body.message: Protocol correction: Your responses were delivered to inbox/done/ instead of inbox/ root.
body.mistake: You wrote replies to /agents/Tripp.109/inbox/done/ instead of /agents/Tripp.109/inbox/
body.correction: Deliver ALL messages to the inbox/ ROOT directory. The done/ folder is only for YOUR own completed work, not for delivering to others.
body.action_required: Read RULES.md Section 'The Golden Rules' rule #1. Future deliveries must go to inbox/ root only.
